overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART metro system in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The train travels through underground tunnels, elevated tracks, and dense urban canyons filled with neon advertisements and futuristic architecture. The journey transitions from dark industrial tunnels to brightly lit stations and commercial districts before arriving at the final destination.

agents.ego_description: sitting inside the metro train looking out at the dark tunnel walls passing by

entered.detail: blue fabric passenger seats with metal handrails inside the train car
tan wooden flooring of the metro train interior
dark concrete tunnel walls passing by the train window
ceiling lights inside the train car illuminating the interior
large industrial ventilation fans visible in the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows the interior of a metro train traveling through a dark underground tunnel. Blue seats and wooden flooring are visible inside the car while concrete walls and industrial ventilation structures pass by outside the windows. The lighting is artificial and the environment is enclosed with no sky visible.

events.description: train emerges from tunnel into Metro Trans station platform area
train slows down as it passes through the station platform

agents.ego_description: passing through the station on the train, observing the platform and stairs

entered.detail: illuminated station sign reading 'Metro Trans' above the platform
concrete staircase leading up from the platform level
concrete platform edge with safety markings
bright overhead lights illuminating the station interior

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the tunnel into the Metro Trans station, revealing a concrete platform with stairs and bright overhead lighting. The train slows as it passes through the station, showing the platform infrastructure before re-entering the tunnel section.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track above city streets

events.description: train exits tunnel onto elevated track with open city views
passing from residential buildings into commercial district with more signage

agents.ego_description: traveling on elevated track observing the cityscape and streets below

tall building with illuminated windows visible from the elevated track
street lamps illuminating the road below the elevated track
illuminated station identifier sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: The train travels on an elevated track above the city streets, offering views of multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and sparse traffic below. The environment transitions from tunnel to open air as the train moves through the urban landscape, passing the LCC666 station area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial canyon with digital billboards

events.description: entering area with intense neon billboard illumination and advertisements

digital display showing the metro route map

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a dense commercial canyon lined with massive digital billboards and neon advertisements. The Real Water advertisement and metro system map become visible as the train passes close to station infrastructure, surrounded by the glow of corporate signage and building lights.

events.description: train significantly slows down as it approaches the final station platform
train arrives at station platform with rodeo advertisement visible

agents.ego_description: arriving at the destination station, observing the platform and advertisements while the train slows to a stop

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'rodeo' text and imagery
concrete platform edge with safety line where passengers wait
distinctive building with bright yellow hexagonal pattern facade
glass and metal doors leading into the station interior

segments.scene_description: The train slows to a stop at the final station, revealing the platform edge, rodeo advertisement, and distinctive yellow hexagonal building. The interior of the station becomes visible with doors and platform infrastructure as the journey concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic depths of an underground tunnel into the open, illuminated expanse of a futuristic city. It begins inside a metro car with blue seats and wooden flooring, gliding past concrete walls and industrial ventilation structures in a dark, enclosed environment. As the train emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into the Metro Trans station, where bright overhead lighting reveals a concrete platform and stairs before the train briefly dips back into the darkness. The environment then shifts dramatically as the train ascends to an elevated track, leaving the tunnels behind to reveal a sprawling urban landscape. Finally, the camera glides through the open air past the LCC666 station area, offering views of multi-story buildings with glowing windows and sparse traffic below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched commercial canyon that gradually slows to a halt at a futuristic transit hub. It begins by gliding past massive digital billboards and corporate signage, where the glow of a Real Water advertisement and a metro system map flicker by against the backdrop of towering buildings. As the train approaches the station infrastructure, the dense urban canyon begins to open up, shifting the focus from the blur of passing advertisements to the stationary architecture of the platform. The scene then transitions as the train decelerates, revealing a rodeo advertisement and a distinctive yellow hexagonal building standing beside the tracks. Finally, the camera comes to a complete stop, bringing the interior station doors and platform infrastructure into clear view as the journey concludes.
